subcodes.first_line: O thou attracted one of the Kingdom! The epistle was received; likewise the enclosed epistle was read. The personage (Mr. . . . .) is in reality
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
